homepage.blog.subtitle.message: Explore product updates, best practices, and insights from real operations scenarios.

homepage.blog.post.1.title.message: The Moment a CMDB Really Fails Is Not When It Cannot Find an Asset, But When It Cannot Follow the Relationships

homepage.blog.post.1.summary.message: Starting from a real early-morning incident review, this piece explains what makes a CMDB truly useful in troubleshooting and how BlueKing Lite connects the dependency chain.

homepage.blog.post.2.title.message: Why Log Alerts Always Feel Like Crying Wolf

homepage.blog.post.2.summary.message: By separating keyword alerts, aggregation alerts, and alert-center ownership, this article explains why log anomalies often become noisy and hard to act on.

homepage.blog.post.3.title.message: 10 Alerts, 1 Real Problem: How to Govern Alert Noise Efficiently

homepage.blog.post.3.summary.message: Using a post-release alert storm as the starting point, this article breaks down the roles of Event, Alert, and Incident, and shows how BK Lite turns 10 noisy signals into one actionable object.

pricing.plan.community.desc.message: Ready-to-use lightweight basic capabilities, ideal for individuals or small teams to quickly get started.

pricing.plan.community.feature.2.message: Basic health status for applications and hosts

pricing.plan.community.feature.7.message: Community docs and examples for quick start

pricing.plan.standard.desc.message: Complete solution covering core operations and AI capabilities for small to medium teams.

pricing.plan.standard.feature.1.message: Full monitoring, metrics analysis, and visualization

pricing.plan.standard.feature.2.message: Multi-channel alerts with convergence and escalation

pricing.plan.standard.feature.3.message: Chatflow visual workflow and task orchestration

pricing.plan.standard.feature.8.message: Auto-generated SLA, weekly reports, and trend analysis

pricing.plan.standard.feature.9.message: Official technical support and update assurance

pricing.plan.enterprise.desc.message: Full-stack intelligent operations platform for large organizations with advanced capabilities and enterprise-grade support.

pricing.plan.enterprise.feature.1.message: Enterprise organization, role, and permission hierarchy

pricing.plan.enterprise.feature.2.message: Centralized management for large-scale complex clusters

pricing.plan.enterprise.feature.3.message: Intelligent root cause analysis and full-chain diagnosis

pricing.plan.enterprise.feature.5.message: Integration with enterprise tools and workflow systems

pricing.plan.enterprise.feature.6.message: Private deployment with local LLM support

pricing.plan.enterprise.feature.7.message: Audit, encryption, HA, and security capabilities

pricing.plan.enterprise.feature.9.message: Canary release, isolation, and priority strategies

pricing.plan.enterprise.feature.10.message: Dedicated technical advisor and enterprise service

pricing.page.desc.message: BlueKing Lite Pricing Plans - Choose the right edition for you

pricing.subtitle.message: AI-native lightweight operations platform, reimagining intelligent ops

playground.error.loginIncomplete.message: Login incomplete. Please log in again.

playground.error.loginFailed.message: Login verification failed. Please log in again.

showcase.security.desc.message: End-to-end security architecture meeting Level 3 protection requirements, providing trusted runtime for critical systems

showcase.lightweight.desc.message: Optimized architecture and resource scheduling, significantly reducing energy consumption while maintaining capabilities

showcase.cost.desc.message: Simplified deployment and operations, significantly reducing TCO through automation

showcase.edge.desc.message: Independent edge operation with offline resilience and self-healing capabilities

showcase.ai.desc.message: Deep LLM integration for intelligent diagnostics, decision support, and automated remediation

showcase.scaling.desc.message: Plug-and-play appliance mode, new nodes auto-discovered and managed for smooth cluster expansion

showcase.i18n.desc.message: Multi-language interface with multi-region compliance, meeting global deployment requirements

showcase.ecosystem.desc.message: Complete plugin system and open APIs for deep third-party integration

cta.title.message: Get Started with Lightweight Intelligent Ops

cta.description.message: A complete open-source operations capability system with flexible modular architecture and AI-driven intelligent decisions. Deploy quickly, get started easily, and build the next-generation operations platform with the community.

cta.qr.description.message: Scan the QR code to join the BlueKing Lite open source community and discuss with developers

features.monitor.description.message: Full monitoring system with second-level collection and precise alerting to ensure system stability

features.log.description.message: Compliant log retention with fast search, providing reliable evidence for troubleshooting and audit

features.cmdb.description.message: Build a trusted IT asset map with comprehensive discovery and architecture restoration for operations decisions and compliance

features.alert.description.message: Aggregate multi-source alerts with intelligent noise reduction and precise routing for fast resolution

features.itsm.description.message: Standardize tickets, changes, and incident workflows for traceable and compliant operations

features.job.description.message: Unified task execution platform supporting scripts, file distribution, and scheduling for batch operations

features.analysis.description.message: Fuse multi-source operations data and transform insights into business value through intelligent analysis

features.console.description.message: Unified work portal aggregating notifications with smart entry and personalized configuration for team collaboration

features.system.description.message: Multi-tenant permission management and audit tracking for secure and traceable system access

features.node.description.message: Unified multi-cloud node management with auto agent deployment and process hosting for large-scale clusters

features.opspilot.description.message: LLM and knowledge graph powered guide for rapid problem identification, intelligent decisions, and efficient remediation

features.mlops.description.message: Operations-focused platform integrating data labeling, model training, and capability release as a unified model factory

community.qr.description.message: Scan the QR code to join the BlueKing Lite open source community and discuss with developers

account.loginDesc.message: Log in to experience AI capabilities, unlock model selection, online inference, and more.

megamenu.cmdb.desc.message: Asset Visibility · Clear Architecture · Trusted Data

megamenu.alert.desc.message: Smart Noise Reduction · Precise Routing · Fast Resolution

megamenu.job.desc.message: Batch Execution · File Distribution · Scheduled Tasks

megamenu.analysis.desc.message: Data Fusion · Smart Analysis · Value Delivery

megamenu.console.desc.message: One-stop Access · Notification Hub · Smart Recommend

megamenu.system.desc.message: Permission Isolation · Fine Control · Full Audit

megamenu.opspilot.desc.message: Auto Diagnosis · Smart Decision · Auto Remediation

megamenu.mlops.desc.message: Data Labeling · Model Training · Capability Release

playground.mlops.anomaly.desc.message: Identify anomalous fluctuations in time series to quickly detect spikes, surges, or drops.

playground.mlops.anomaly.guide.message: Suitable for monitoring metrics and resource utilization data. Use sample data or upload your own time series for validation.

playground.mlops.time-series.desc.message: Predict future data trends based on historical patterns, ideal for capacity and load forecasting.

playground.mlops.time-series.guide.message: Select a model and try with sample data first, then upload your own metrics to verify prediction results.

playground.mlops.log-analysis.desc.message: Cluster and categorize log content to identify similar issues and anomalous log patterns.

playground.mlops.log-analysis.guide.message: Suitable for batch log understanding and problem categorization. Use sample logs or upload text logs to try.

playground.mlops.text-classification.des.message: Automatically classify text content, suitable for tickets, alert descriptions, and text labeling scenarios.

playground.mlops.text-classification.gui.message: Suitable for standardized text categorization. Use sample text, paste batch content, or upload text files to try.

playground.mlops.image-classification.de.message: Identify image categories, suitable for standardized image recognition and auto-categorization tasks.

playground.mlops.image-classification.gu.message: Suitable for single-target image classification. Image upload and inference will be available soon.

playground.mlops.object-detection.desc.message: Detect object locations and categories in images for visual tasks requiring both localization and recognition.

playground.mlops.object-detection.guide.message: Suitable for multi-target detection in images. Sample images and detection results will be available soon.

playground.mlops.authExpiredMsg.message: Login has expired. Please log in again to continue.

playground.mlops.selectSceneHint.message: Select a scenario from the left to get started.

playground.mlops.loginFirst.message: Please log in first to select a model

playground.mlops.noModelAvailable.message: No models available for this scenario

playground.mlops.unlockExperience.message: Log in to unlock model experience

playground.mlops.unlockDesc.message: After selecting a model, you can use sample data, upload data, and start online inference.

playground.opspilot.description.message: OpsPilot AI scenario experience is being refined. More intelligent operations capabilities will be available soon.
